## Task
Build a child page for Labs.

The page should follow the same structure and style as the home page and Agenda page.
Use `labs-template.txt` in the repo root for the labs content.

## Assigned to
Agent Mode in IDE (VS Code) — use Copilot Chat in Agent Mode, referencing the existing pages for structure.

## Completion
When the Labs page is complete, close this issue:

```bash
gh issue close 4 --repo <owner/repo>
```

> Agent Mode: please run this command automatically once the page is built and verified.
